\tzpentry{ID4497}{Projection Properties Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4497 introduces Projection Properties Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:projection-properties} \|P\| = 1,\quad \text{$P$ maximizes mutual information under compression,} \quad \chi_{\mathrm{top}}(X) = \chi_{\mathrm{top}}(P X) \end{equation}
